TextView.android:text:
Nutrition Tips

1. Drink Plenty of Water
Stay hydrated by drinking at least 6–8 glasses daily.

2. Eat Balanced Meals
Include proteins, carbohydrates, and healthy fats in every meal.

3. Increase Fruit and Vegetable Intake
Aim for at least 5 servings a day.

4. Reduce Sugar Consumption
Limit sugary drinks and snacks.

5. Choose Whole Grains
Opt for brown bread, oats, and whole grain rice.

6. Control Portion Sizes
Avoid overeating by keeping portions moderate.

7. Eat Regular Meals
Do not skip meals, especially breakfast.

8. Limit Processed Foods
Reduce intake of fast foods and packaged snacks.

9. Include Protein in Diet
Eat beans, eggs, fish, or lean meat regularly.

10. Practice Healthy Snacking
Choose nuts, fruits, or yogurt instead of junk food.
